headline: Does Targa Resources' 25% Dividend Hike Outlook Make It A Smart Hold?
summary: TRGP gains momentum with strong Q4 results, Permian growth and a planned 25% dividend hike by 2026, though heavy capex and basin risks cloud the outlook.
